Gap Description: No documentation on integrating zipBoard with CI/CD pipelines such as GitHub Actions or GitLab CI for automated feedback collection.
Suggested Title: CI/CD Integration Guide for Automated Feedback

Gap Description: Lack of detailed WCAG compliance documentation and accessibility testing procedures for zipBoard UI and shared content.
No troubleshooting steps or best‑practice guide for users encountering ad‑blockers or extension installation issues on various browsers.
Missing detailed instructions for configuring SSO (SAML/OAuth) and IP whitelisting to meet enterprise security requirements.
Insufficient coverage of webhook creation, authentication, and automation patterns for custom workflow integration beyond basic API docs.
